## Changelog
* 935b49cb434fb63958891dcfb13859095ab682bf: Add 8 new v2 examples — complete coverage of language features (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)

* 81132039f58e73df4aae4bf332edefacf98ca706: Add aspects to services design — compile-time cross-cutting concerns (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 77f27a48ec5afec008ec75896b593abf862f5107: Add class inheritance, *args/**kwargs, default args, ** power (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 6346aba963d1c0895bd809127a6787df01d3f705: Add comprehensions, generator expressions, single-quote strings (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)

* 858ff10365c78ca82c28833fe3135a3b58655519: Add not-in, is-not, none, dict comprehensions, tuple unpack, auto-self (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* dcfab3c2cc2e48b3781bdf79ea9286857e731000: Add packaging/deployment options — PyInstaller, Nuitka, Docker, PEX (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 9116574079355254c9275222f3999f626abd4597: Add power operator, with statement, _ private convention (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* aa1afa24863edb72ebd51103b3145e940d5c2079: Add service lifetimes to design — singleton, scoped, transient (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 43cf1d8035ffdb90f088afb4b08679f483025e39: Add services design doc — compile-time DI, providers, convention routing (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 7b3d37ce60329fd2b225f1adf9bcf1d6ebdfb218: Add smart collection dispatch — auto-detect Polars/NumPy at runtime (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)

* 9263a2bde1cb36b144512e5b21d4be3c34dbb134: Batch of practical fixes: decorators, multi-import, assert, print, cleanup (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 9cae400602264e620dabdf864c2d4896a62e3bab: Complete language reference, is type checks, fix len() generator bug (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 51fb882e0747b46a1ce0ba295f776b431502c00c: Disable CI and release workflow auto-triggers — Actions quota exceeded (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* f976b9d679ae524b64ad5f78aca2718644ed4502: Docker builds free-threaded Python from source — true GIL-free containers (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* e060eaa23f6e6f8792feafc7501ef60ae459ac5e: Final audit cleanup: sync docs with reality, fix over-promises (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 99fb6955aeee8e61da2a9f9e7e5e525510295d57: Fix data keyword — fully usable as variable name in all contexts (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 0bb391802a18cdf78191e99800087041dcf6af66: Fix free-threaded Python detection — now running GIL-free by default (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 4b928c0d5efbf4134d3b8889b955337d7d38cf99: Free-threaded Python as default runtime (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* 3f2f847e9bbabad0770050452d41dedb4ac7c078: GIL detection, free-threaded auto-dispatch, smart data shape dispatch (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
* ad078b5304c51521bc2675c27926af13d3dc94d8: Implement two-track error handling — Result[T] / Err {} blocks (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)

* ea7fb879ebb124bfbbe259b4ad9cce7e03ddb5f2: Make Polars/NumPy a transpile-time option, not runtime detection (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)

* d94d30849d8f20e178e103a2636cb20a026e2bd6: Remove union types — non-goal, use Result[T] or any instead (Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>)
